# PHIL.121 ? Move Fast and Break Things

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** execution_velocity
**Subcategory:** move_fast_and_break_things
**Domain:** EXECUTION_VELOCITY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Prioritize speed and learning over perfection in early stages

## Application
Ship quickly, accept some breakage, learn from failures, iterate rapidly, optimize for learning speed
